title: Quarantine Configuration
description: Schema for quarantine.yml configuration file. Lives in the repository root and is created by 'quarantine init'. Tokens are never stored in this file -- authentication is handled exclusively through environment variables.

version.description: Config schema version. Must be the integer 1. Allows the CLI to detect incompatible config files from future versions.

framework.description: Test framework in use. Determines default junitxml glob, rerun command, and test exclusion flags. Case-sensitive. No auto-detection; must be set explicitly.

retries.description: Number of times to re-run a failing test before declaring it a genuine failure. A test that passes on any retry is classified as flaky.

junitxml.description: Glob pattern for locating JUnit XML output files. Supports multiple files for parallel test runners. Framework-specific defaults: jest='junit.xml', rspec='rspec.xml', vitest='junit-report.xml'.

github.description: GitHub repository identification. Both fields are auto-detected from the git remote if omitted.

owner.description: GitHub organization or user that owns the repository. Auto-detected from the origin remote URL if omitted.

repo.description: GitHub repository name (without the owner prefix). Auto-detected from the origin remote URL if omitted.

issue_tracker.description: Issue tracking system for flaky test tickets. v1 supports only 'github'. Forward-compatible field for v2+ (jira, etc.).

labels.description: Labels applied to GitHub Issues for flaky tests. v1 accepts only the exact list ['quarantine']. Used for deterministic issue deduplication. Forward-compatible field for v2+ custom labels.

notifications.description: Notification channels. v1 supports only github_pr_comment. Forward-compatible field for v2+ (slack, email).

github_pr_comment.description: When true, the CLI posts or updates a PR comment summarizing flaky test findings. Comments are identified by a hidden HTML marker to avoid duplicates.

storage.description: Configuration for quarantine state storage. No 'backend' field -- v1 only supports branch-based storage. Actions cache is used internally as a degraded-mode fallback.

branch.description: Git branch name where quarantine.json is stored. Created by 'quarantine init' and never merged. The CLI uses the GitHub Contents API with SHA-based CAS for optimistic concurrency.

exclude.description: Glob patterns for tests that Quarantine ignores entirely. Matched tests are not retried, not quarantined, and do not trigger issue creation. Patterns match against the test_id (file_path::classname::name). Supports *, **, and ? glob syntax.

rerun_command.description: Override the auto-detected rerun command template for re-running individual failing tests. Supports {name}, {classname}, and {file} placeholders. When empty, the framework-specific default is used.
